3110840.name: At Daggers Drawn
3110840.description:
Apo's Paradise is in danger!

Apo Sully the creator of this world has fallen, his remains were scavenged by his siblings. They thought Sully was all-powerful but were surprised that only one of their loved ones could be revived. With this, a war broke out and no one emerged as a winner. It is your task as the savior to vanquish this stigma and end this agony that looms in paradise.

At Daggers Drawn is a third-person open-world game where you only need to kick balls to defeat the opponent. Not only that, but players also have other options when facing opponents for example unlimited dash and teleport to evade the enemy. At the same time, you also have a high jump to travel across high elevations during your gameplay.

At Daggers Drawn offers smooth gameplay and is compatible with all types of PC specifications so players can focus on the game.

Overall, At Daggers Drawn will take you back to a time in gaming when you didn't have to worry about which is the best effective tactic to defeat the opponent, you just have to kick, dash, or teleport and have fun!
3110840.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
